# Stella Launcher

Electrobun-based thin launcher for the Stella desktop app.

IMPORTANT: Electrobun is NOT Electron. Do not use Electron APIs or patterns.

## Architecture

- `src/bun/` — Main process (runs in Bun). Handles setup, dependency checks, process management, tray.
- `src/mainview/` — Webview UI (React). Shows setup wizard and status.
- `src/shared/` — Shared RPC types between main and webview.

## Documentation

Full Electrobun API reference: https://blackboard.sh/electrobun/llms.txt

## Import patterns

- Main process (Bun): `import { BrowserWindow, Tray, Utils } from "electrobun/bun"`
- Browser context: `import { Electroview } from "electrobun/view"`
- Use `views://` URLs to load bundled assets.
